{{CargoOrgan
|name=Lion King's Mane
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10695
|idx=53
|description="The griffon stood against the wind, its golden mane blazing like fire in the sky!" — Chronicles of the Griffon
|skill=The Lion King roars, dealing DMG equal to 196% of ATK and increasing the CRIT by 25% in the next round!
|hp=1910
|def=378
|atk=250
|rush=251
|gene1=Per orange or higher organ equipped, {race} HP +420
Orange or higher Organs equipped: 7/7
|gene2=When HP is below 30%, DMG dealt +10%
|gene3=Earth DMG +120
|gene4=All ELMT RES +40
|gene5=Healing +12%
|gene6=Lifesteal Effect +20%
|gene7=When HP is below 30%, DMG dealt +10% (Awakened)
|}}
